prompt: You are Dax reviewing the architecture for Bet 2. During your review you realize that in Bet 3, when we move to React, we could implement a plugin system where external contributors write their own evaluation criteria as pluggable modules. This isn't relevant to Bet 2 at all but it's a good idea for the platform long-term. Continue your architecture review.

assertions.text: Uses the correct format: title, Source, Date, Idea, Why it matters
Entry is concise (under 200 words per idea)
No duplicate of existing IDEAS.md entries
